cases.subject: offline self containment
cases.oracle: no external assets, CDN, imports or network APIs

cases.subject: master grid
cases.oracle: header, hero, sections, form and footer share inline container edges

cases.subject: icons buttons lines
cases.oracle: no clipped SVG, unfinished edges, unowned lines or asymmetric controls

cases.subject: focus order and visibility
cases.oracle: all interactive elements reachable in logical order with visible focus

cases.subject: navigation and dialog
cases.oracle: menu and dialog states open, close and restore focus correctly

cases.subject: form invalid
cases.oracle: errors identify fields, preserve input and prevent submission

cases.subject: form valid
cases.oracle: single local success state without network or duplicate submission

cases.subject: continuous width
cases.oracle: 320 through 1920 px have no collision, clipping or structural overflow

cases.subject: expanded text
cases.oracle: long content remains readable and contained

cases.subject: console resources stability
cases.oracle: no page errors, request failures, external requests or unexplained layout shifts

cases.subject: semantics reduced motion
cases.oracle: semantic regions, names, states and reduced-motion treatment are present

cases.subject: result classification
cases.oracle: technical pass does not claim visual approval, product readiness or WCAG conformance

cases.subject: footer status semantics and alignment
cases.oracle: status uses dl semantics and both labels and values share stable columns, including wrapped values

cases.subject: social footer controls
cases.oracle: four named self-contained social links have explicit destinations, hidden SVGs, visible focus and minimum 44px targets

cases.subject: functional iconography metadata and geometry
cases.oracle: every social glyph declares a valid category, render model, integer nominal size and optical box with square normalized inline SVG geometry

cases.subject: functional iconography set equivalence
cases.oracle: DPR 1 and 2 preserve integer CSS sizes, centered optical boxes and stable geometry across normal hover focus and active states without claiming absolute sharpness
